stageGoal: 梳理扩展入口、命令注册、配置键、聊天参与者、帮助文档、菜单文案和测试中所有 Ralph/ralph/ralph-runner 相关引用，形成精确的替换边界。
summary: Completed the Ralph branding inventory and codified exact replacement boundaries, case rules, and preserve rules for the upcoming Harness Runner rebrand stories.
architectureNotes: The story output is intentionally artifact-only and isolated to .harness-runner so it can be rolled back independently from the interrupted US-002 source changes.
Contribution-point renames should be handled as one cohesive next step: package.json, src/extension.ts runtime registration, and matching tests/docs.
Internal symbol renames should be staged separately after contribution points because workspacePaths.ts and localization APIs act as high-fan-out import seams.
keyDecisions: Use a dedicated brand-boundary analysis artifact as the authoritative inventory for reviewer handoff.
Preserve .harness-runner, harness-engineering, and known Harness-branded runtime paths from further rename churn.
Record metadata.ralphLanguage as a deferred compatibility seam instead of forcing an inconsistent rename in this story.
confirmedConstraints: Required completion artifacts now exist under .harness-runner.
A projectConstraints.testCommands command was executed successfully.
US-001 changes do not modify runtime source behavior.
unresolvedRisks: US-002 source-file edits are already present in the worktree and remain unreviewed by this story.
Repository metadata and generated package outputs still expose old branding until later rebrand stories land.
Agent Map documentation is known stale relative to the current change surface and should be regenerated after the rename workflow settles.
nextStoryPrerequisites: Read .harness-runner/analysis/brand-boundaries.US-001.json before changing package metadata or command ids.
Inspect existing worktree changes first so US-002 resumes from the latest stable partial state rather than assuming a clean tree.
Keep .harness-runner path values unchanged while renaming symbolic and contribution-point surfaces.
resumeRecommendation: Resume US-002 by validating the interrupted package metadata and runtime registration edits against the inventory produced here, then finish the contribution-point rename cluster before touching broader symbol names.
